headline: Strong Lumber Demand Asserts Weyerhaeuser Company (WY) Breakout Growth Prospects
summary: Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY) is one of the stocks positioned for breakout growth. On March 30, DA Davidson reiterated a Buy rating on Weyerhaeuser Company (NYSE:WY) with a $31 price target. The bullish stance comes as the research firm expects the company to benefit from strong lumber demand and rising prices. After years of capacity reductions […]
